name: ASUS ROG Crosshair X670E Extreme (WiFi 6E) Socket AM5 (LGA 1718) Ryzen 7000 EATX Gaming motherboard EATX (20 + 2 power stages, PCIe 5.0, DDR5 support, five M.2 slots, USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 front-panel)
shortName: ASUS ROG Crosshair X670E Extreme (WiFi 6E) Socket AM5 (LGA 1718)
description: High-end EATX gaming motherboard for AMD Ryzen 7000 processors with PCIe 5.0 and WiFi 6E support.
